title: Niche playbook: photo-manifest
description: Required photography shot list per niche. Stage 4 (asset scraping) uses this to enforce minimum counts per category and to flag missing categories as MANUAL-DROP-NEEDED. Per-shot lighting, composition, and dimension hints inform the brief if a photo shoot is needed.

categories.description: One entry per photographic category required by this niche. Modules 2D / 4 enforce counts per category.

targetFolder.description: Path under clients/[Client Name]/[Client Name] Assets/ where harvested files for this category land. Example: "founder-photos/", "project-images/", "host-photos/".

lighting.description: Lighting brief the photographer or stock-photo search should target. "any" means no constraint.

composition.description: Free-form composition note. Example: "chest-up, neutral background, eye-line to camera" for owner; "wide exterior including signage" for hero.

notes.description: Any niche-specific guidance (props to include, things to avoid, season constraints, etc.).

required.description: If true, pipeline halts when minCount is not met. If false, just logs a warning.

stockBan.description: If true, Stage 4 refuses to substitute stock photos for missing categories. Always true for premium niches; defaults true everywhere.

photoShootBriefRequired.description: If true and any category falls below minCount, Stage 4 writes a photo-shoot brief into the proposal for the client to price in.
